_comment: Add the 'penpot' entry under mcpServers in your Claude Code settings.json
_warning: The unscoped 'penpot-mcp-server' package (no @ prefix) is READ-ONLY. It cannot create or modify content. Use one of the options below instead.

penpot._comment: Option A: @ancrz/penpot-mcp-server — Python, 68 tools, full write support (recommended)

_option_b._comment: Option B: @zcubekr/penpot-mcp-server — Node.js, write support, no extra runtime needed

_option_c._comment: Option C: @penpot/mcp (official) — arbitrary code execution via browser extension
